featured_projects.title: Personal AI Assistant (Raspberry Pi)
featured_projects.description: Self-hosted AI assistant running on Raspberry Pi using OpenClaw, Ollama, and Telegram bot integration. Features local AI models, automation scripts, and personal productivity tools.
outcomes: Fully self-hosted AI assistant with no cloud dependencies
Integrated with Telegram for remote access and control
Automated server monitoring and home automation capabilities
Learning platform for AI/ML and edge computing

featured_projects.title: Solar Dashboard Integration
featured_projects.description: Unified dashboard for collecting power generation data from multiple solar installations using Growatt APIs. Built for monitoring and analytics across distributed solar assets.
outcomes: Reverse-engineered Growatt solar panel APIs
Built unified monitoring for multiple solar installations
Real-time power generation tracking and analytics
Foundation for energy management automation

featured_projects.title: Insurance Platform Modernization
featured_projects.description: Led architectural migration of legacy insurance systems to event-driven microservices architecture at Allstate. Served millions of users with improved reliability and performance.
outcomes: Migrated from synchronous to async event-driven architecture
Reduced operational effort by 40% through workflow automation
Improved incident resolution by 50% with better observability
Enabled independent deployments across 8-person engineering team

featured_projects.title: Global Event Management Platform
featured_projects.description: Scaled backend services for global events company (Hyve Group) to handle thousands of concurrent users during peak event periods with real-time updates.
outcomes: Designed Kafka-based real-time data pipelines
Handled thousands of concurrent users during peak events
Reduced data latency across distributed systems
Cross-team technical alignment and architecture ownership

featured_projects.title: Payment Processing Optimization
featured_projects.description: Enhanced global payment platform (Worldline) for high-volume transaction processing with improved scalability and real-time capabilities.
outcomes: Integrated Kafka queues with payment microservices
Enabled real-time processing of high transaction volumes
Improved system scalability and throughput
Full-stack collaboration with Angular frontend teams

side_projects.title: Interview Preparation System
side_projects.description: Personal system for FAANG interview preparation including LeetCode problem tracking, system design practice, and progress monitoring.

side_projects.title: Home Server Infrastructure
side_projects.description: Self-hosted personal server setup with domains, SSL certificates, monitoring, and various automation tools.
